sprite::rewrite< OPER > Struct Template Reference

 rewrite ()

Detailed Description

template<>
struct sprite::rewrite< OPER >

Rewrites a node to an OPER node.

The tag is set to OPER, and id is the operation ID.

Definition at line 15 of file rewrite.hpp.

Note:
This function _claims_ ownership of the pointer and will delete it with delete[].
